properties.title: PATMOS-x AVHRR reflectance, brightness temperature and cloud product CDRs
properties.description: Virtual Zarr representation of NOAA PATMOS-x cloud properties stored as an Icechunk repository. Includes ASC/DES passes with time_coverage_start-derived timestamps.

acha_info.description: processing information for ACHA (0=no/1=yes) 1:Cloud Height Attempted 2:Bias Correction Employed 3:Ice Cloud Retrieval 4:Local Radiative Center Processing Used 5:Multi-layer Retrieval 6:Lower Cloud Interpolation Used 7:Boundary Layer Inversion Assumed

attrs.long_name: processing information for ACHA (0=no/1=yes) 1:Cloud Height Attempted 2:Bias Correction Employed 3:Ice Cloud Retrieval 4:Local Radiative Center Processing Used 5:Multi-layer Retrieval 6:Lower Cloud Interpolation Used 7:Boundary Layer Inversion Assumed
attrs.flag_meanings: Cloud_Height_Attempted  Bias_Correction_Employed  Ice_Cloud_Retrieval  Local_Radiative_Center_Processing_Used  Multi_Layer_Retrieval  Lower_Cloud_Interpolation_Used  Boundary_Layer_Inversion_Assumed

acha_quality.description: quality flags for ACHA products 1:Processed (0=no,1=yes) 2:valid Tc retrieval (1=yes,0=no) 3:valid ec retrieval (1=yes,0=no) 4:valid beta retrieval (1=yes,0=no) 5:degraded Tc retrieval (1=yes,0=no) 6:degraded ec retrieval (1=yes,0=no) 7:degraded beta retrieval (1=yes,0=no)

dcomp_quality.description: quality flags for DCOMP products 1:Processed (0=no,1=yes) 2:valid COD retrieval (0=yes,1=no) 3:valid REF retrieval (0=yes,1=no) 4:degraded COD retrieval (0=no,1=degraded) 5:degraded REF retrieval (0=no,1=degraded) 6:convergency (0=no,1=yes) 7:glint (0=no,1=yes)

dcomp_info.description: processing flags for DCOMP 1:land/sea mask (0=land,1=sea) 2:day/night mask (0=Day,1=Night) 3:twilight (65-82 solar zenith) (0=no,1=yes) 4:snow (0=no,1= snow) 5:sea-ice (0=no,1=sea-ice) 6:phase (0=liquid,1=ice) 7:thick_cloud (0=no,1=yes) 8:thin_cloud (0=no,1=yes)

attrs.long_name: processing flags for DCOMP 1:land/sea mask (0=land,1=sea) 2:day/night mask (0=Day,1=Night) 3:twilight (65-82 solar zenith) (0=no,1=yes) 4:snow (0=no,1= snow) 5:sea-ice (0=no,1=sea-ice) 6:phase (0=liquid,1=ice) 7:thick_cloud (0=no,1=yes) 8:thin_cloud (0=no,1=yes)
attrs.flag_meanings: land_or_sea_mask day_or_night_mask twilight_@65-82_solar_zenith snow sea_ice liquid_or_ice_phase thick_cloud thin_cloud
